tv_results.name: Sentenced to Be a Hero
tv_results.original_name: 勇者刑に処す 懲罰勇者9004隊刑務記録
tv_results.overview: In a world where heroism is a punishment, Xylo Forbartz, a condemned goddess killer, battles endless hordes of monstrous abominations as part of Penal Hero Unit 9004. Death is no escape, only a cycle of resurrection and relentless combat. But when Xylo encounters a mysterious new goddess, their unlikely alliance sparks a rebellion that could shatter the chains of eternal punishment.
